intent: Stress fixed recurring digital-service charges that consume discretionary headroom.
expectedEvaluatorBehavior: Evaluator should surface concentration in recurring micro-obligations and potential cancellation opportunities.
customerProfileSummary: Subscription-heavy profile with many recurring card debits each cycle.
whatToLookFor: High subscription load percentage, reduced discretionary headroom, and recurring-spend concentration.
realWorldPattern: Many recurring streaming/app/software charges posting in the same window.
sanitizedNotice: No production subscriptions, user identities, or payment credentials are present.
